Title: sql_config_data_sources
Description: Configures a remote DSN as in the DSN attribute string

This function creates or modifies a user or system data source based on the semicolon
    separated list of DSN attributes.
The type argument must be either 'system' or 'user'.

Configures the data source by calling SQLWriteDSNToIni/SQLWritePrivateProfileString/SQLSetConfigMode
    from the ODBC Installer API.
